# REXEDITZZ Videos

Place your portfolio videos in this folder.

Recommended names:

- `cinematic-brand-film.mp4`
- `motion-launch.mp4`
- `reels-pack.mp4`
- `thumbnail-breakdown.mp4`

Then update `src/config/portfolio.ts` so each video entry points to the right file path, such as `/videos/cinematic-brand-film.mp4`.
